_comment: Annotate the traffic timeline with real events to measure their before/after impact. Add one object per event: {"date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "label": "What happened", "url": "optional link"}. Lift = avg daily page views in the 3 days from the event (inclusive) vs. the 7 days before. This is correlational, not proof of cause. The two seeded entries are auto-detected traffic spikes — replace their labels with the real cause, or delete them.

events.label: Traffic spike (auto-detected — replace with real cause)
Page-view spike (auto-detected — replace with real cause)
